title: The Secret Garden
author: Frances Hodgson Burnett
blurb: Whether you're a fan of secrets, gardens, secret gardens, or Theosophy, this book has you covered. It's a delightful read! (And just look at that cute robin.)
blurb2: In Burnett's original draft of the novel, the plot focused on a sweet little girl steadily being driven sour and sickly by a swooping red-winged blackbird — those spotted idiots that don't ever shut the hell up when I'm trying to edit these visual novels. But eventually that plot was tweaked slightly, and the rest is history.
